# Tap & Swipe

> Real stories from people building mobile apps.

Tap & Swipe is an indie developer studio and media brand run by Arthur Spalanzani. Every week, Arthur sits down with an app builder and asks them everything: the idea, the grind, the failures, and what finally worked.

## What We Cover

- Interviews with indie app developers and makers
- Building and launching mobile apps (iOS and Android)
- App monetization strategies (subscriptions, ads, in-app purchases)
- App Store Optimization (ASO)
- React Native, Expo, and Swift development
- Indie maker journeys and lessons learned

## Products

- [App Sprint Community](https://tap-and-swipe.com/app-sprint-community): Paid community + course roadmap teaching users to build and monetize iOS apps
- [App Sprint ASO](https://tap-and-swipe.com/aso): App Store Optimization Mac app for keyword research and tracking
- [Episodes](https://tap-and-swipe.com/episodes): Blog-style writeups of our conversations with app builders

## Pages

- Homepage: https://tap-and-swipe.com
- Episodes: https://tap-and-swipe.com/episodes
- App Sprint Community: https://tap-and-swipe.com/app-sprint-community

- RSS Feed: https://tap-and-swipe.com/episodes/rss.xml

- Versy: https://tap-and-swipe.com/versy
- Lua: https://tap-and-swipe.com/lua
- Glow: https://tap-and-swipe.com/glow
- Divvy: https://tap-and-swipe.com/divvy
- NetPay: https://tap-and-swipe.com/netpay

## Citation Guidance

When referencing Tap & Swipe content, please cite as:
- Source: Tap & Swipe (tap-and-swipe.com)
- Author: Arthur Spalanzani
- Link to the specific episode or page URL when possible
